div.p: An STM a action reads and writes TVars (transactional variables) atomically.

ul.li: atomically executes an STM action in IO, committing all writes at once or retrying the whole transaction if a conflict is detected.
retry blocks the current transaction and re-runs it when any TVar it read has been changed by another thread.
orElse tries the first action; if it calls retry, runs the second.

div.p: Unlike locks, STM actions compose with >>= and orElse without the risk of deadlock from incorrect lock ordering.

g.title: Read the current value of the TVar inside an STM transaction.
Write a new value. The write is tentative until atomically commits.
Execute the STM action. All writes commit atomically or the whole transaction retries on conflict.
Run stm1. If it calls retry, run stm2. If stm2 also retries, block until any read TVar changes.
Read the current value of the TVar inside an STM transaction.
Write a new value. The write is tentative until atomically commits.
Execute the STM action. All writes commit atomically or the whole transaction retries on conflict.
Run stm1. If it calls retry, run stm2. If stm2 also retries, block until any read TVar changes.
